title: fishing hook bobber 3D
body:
Replaces the 2D fishing hook with a 3D one

available with and without line at the top, in 3 different modes.

![versions overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9LkpbDXl/images/6e58b0746e08cd57f57a8b34cee122cb3a4fca56.png)

compatible with Optifine/Sodium

not compatible with Iris/Optifine Shaders

has support for Aquaculture 2 (the Aquaculture team has given me permission to use their textures, to add support in this pack)

![aquaculture support image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9LkpbDXl/images/08bac37cb58882820815be37042e81c2ebb9a866.png)
